info.title: Permy — Building Permit & Construction Intelligence API
info.description: Normalized permits, contractor activity, property timelines, and ZIP development signals — ranked, sourced, and ready for your app. Give Permy an address, city, ZIP, contractor, or trade and get back clean, machine-readable municipal intelligence with source links and confidence scores.

get.summary: Full permit detail with enrichment + source links
Normalize an address → jurisdiction, city/county, parcel hints, coverage status

parameters.name: address

schema.description: Full street address, e.g. '10912 Mystic Timber Dr, Austin, TX 78754'
schema.title: Address

parameters.description: Full street address, e.g. '10912 Mystic Timber Dr, Austin, TX 78754'

get.summary: Full permit history for an address
Find contractors by name, license, city, trade, activity
Permit count, trade mix, active cities, value bands, momentum, source confidence
ZIP-level development momentum: volume, value, trade mix, MoM delta, hotspot 0–100
Ranked opportunities for a buyer persona with lead_score + recommended_action + reason

post.summary: Address or permit_id + persona → development_score, risk_flags, market narrative, sources
Create a saved search with optional webhook delivery

schema.title: Response List Alerts V1 Alerts Get

post.summary: Send a signed HMAC test payload to your webhook URL

get.summary: [Sample, no key] Search permits — capped at 10 records
[Sample, no key] Supported cities + per-city fields
[Sample, no key] Search contractors — capped at 10 records
[Sample, no key] Ranked leads — capped at 10 records
Supported cities, fields available per city, freshness

ContractorRef.title: ContractorRef
ContractorRef.description: Contractor as attached to a permit (denormalized summary).

fields.title: Fields
fields.description: true / false / 'partial' — honestly notes where a city publishes a field only sometimes (e.g. owner via contact list).

valuation_usd.title: Valuation Usd
valuation_usd.description: Declared job value in USD; null when city doesn't publish

PermitTimelineEntry.title: PermitTimelineEntry
PermitTimelineEntry.description: A permit rolled up for property timeline views.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-RapidAPI-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Your RapidAPI app key (sent automatically by the gateway). Direct-site callers may use X-API-Key or Authorization: Bearer instead.
